understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level without dying, finishing BP35 and then continuing through subsequent levels until the game is won, within the allowed attempts and turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (or UNDO). After any horizontal move, the character then automatically travels in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK targets a specific tile position to interact with clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., removing an 'x' block) and does not move the player unless the removal opens a gravity path that immediately causes a fall. Landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v') ends the attempt immediately. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from mistakes. Each level has 2 attempts and each attempt has a fixed turn budget.
